transcript: Speaker A: How old are you? Speaker B: I have 22. Speaker A: I have 22 ಅಲ್ಲ, I am 22 years old ಅಂತ ಹೇಳ್ಬೇಕು. [Not 'I have 22', you should say 'I am 22 years old'.] Speaker B: Okay, okay. I am 22 years old. Speaker A: Where are you from? Speaker B: I am Karnataka. Speaker A: I am Karnataka ಅಲ್ಲ, I am from Karnataka ಅಂತ ಹೇಳ್ಬೇಕು. [Not 'I am Karnataka', you should say 'I am from Karnataka'.] Speaker B: Ohh... okay okay. ನನಗೆ English ಚೆನ್ನಾಗಿ ಬರೋದಿಲ್ಲ. [Ohh... okay okay. I don't know English well.] Speaker A: ಏನೂ ಪ್ರಾಬ್ಲಮ್ ಇಲ್ಲ, AI teacher ಟ್ರೈ ಮಾಡ್ತೀಯಾ? [No problem, will you try an AI teacher?] Speaker B: ಅದು ತುಂಬಾ costly ಇರುತ್ತಲ್ವಾ? [That must be very costly, right?] Speaker A: ಅಯ್ಯೋ ಇಲ್ಲ, normal English classes ಗಿಂತ 7x cheap ಇದೆ. ಅದಕ್ಕೆ 1 ಕೋಟಿ ಜನ MySivi ನಲ್ಲಿ ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದಾರೆ. [Oh no, it's 7x cheaper than normal English classes. That's why 1 crore people are practicing on MySivi.] Speaker B: ಆದ್ರೆ ಟೈಮ್ ಸಿಗಲ್ಲ. [But I don't get time.] Speaker A: ದಿನಕ್ಕೆ ಜಸ್ಟ್ 15-20 minutes ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್ ಸಾಕು, ನೀನು ಫುಲ್ ಕಾನ್ಫಿಡೆಂಟ್ ಆಗ್ತೀಯಾ. [Just 15-20 minutes of practice a day is enough, you will become fully confident.] Speaker B: Wow, ಹೇಗೆ join ಆಗೋದು? [Wow, how to join?] Speaker A: ಈ install ಬಟನ್ ಕ್ಲಿಕ್ ಮಾಡಿ, MySivi ಆಪ್ ಡೌನ್ಲೋಡ್ ಮಾಡಿ. [Click this install button and download the MySivi app.]
on_screen_text: How old are you? I have 22. I am 22 years old. Where are you from? I am Karnataka. I am from Karnataka. ನನಗೆ English [My English]. ಅದು ತುಂಬಾ costly [That is very costly]. Normal English classes ಗಿಂತ [Than normal English classes]. 7x Cheaper. ಅದಕ್ಕೇ [That's why]. ಆದ್ರೆ time ಸಿಗಲ್ಲ [But I don't get time]. ದಿನಕ್ಕೆ [Per day]. 15-20 minutes. ನೀನು full confident [You full confident]. ಹೇಗೆ join ಆಗೋದು [How to join]. MySivi English speaking app Install Now.
summary: An AI avatar corrects a woman's English grammar in a split-screen format. The avatar promotes the MySivi app as a highly affordable, quick daily practice tool to build English confidence. The ad concludes with a call to install the app.
